titleStmt.title: SII 15.156: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 156. (B.K. No. 51 of 1928-29.) KANDGAL, HUNGUND TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab in the compound of the Hanumān temple.

This is dated the 8th regnal year of the king, Prabhava, Āshāḍha-amāvāsye-Sunday, solar eclipse. The date is irregular. The only solar eclipse of the year Prabhava, corresponding to 1207 A.D., occurred in Śrāvaṇa on August 25, the weekday being Saturday. There was an Adhika Āshāḍha month in the year; but neither in the Adhika nor in the Nija Āshāḍha did the tithi fall on Sunday.

It registers a gift of land and house-site by the Prabhus of Kandagale to the temple of the god Telligēśvara constructed by Telliga-ayvattokkalu. Further gifts to the deity comprising levies on oilmills, shares in the articles on sale, etc., were made by the Five Hundred Svāmis of Ayyāvaḷe and others. The representatives of this trading corporation are said to have assembled at Kandagale for this solemn occasion. At this time Lakshmīdēvarasa, a subordinate of the king was governing the tract of Karaḍikal Three-hundred.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāyaśaṁbhavē
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ dvārāvatīpurarādhīsva
reṁ yādavakuḷakamaḷakaḷikāvikāsabhāskaraṁ māḷavīmallayahita rā
ya gūrjjaravāraṇāṁkuśa teluṁgarāyaśirakamaḷōtpāṭana yādava
nārāyaṇaṁ pratāpacakravartti siṁgaṇadēvarasaru dēvagiriya nelevīḍino
ḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyuttamiralu śrīmatsiṁhaṇadēvana pādapaṁkēja
śiḷīmukha lakṣmīdēvarasaru karaḍikallu 300 tribhō
gābhyaṁtarasiddhiyiṁdāḷuttamire svastyanēkaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkritaru nayavina
ya guṇasaṁpaṁna gaṇōttuṁgaruṁ saddharmakathāprasiddharuṁ
yā samayasamuddheraṇaruṁ
rāya vappayyāvaḷeyayinūrvva svāmi
gaḷu mukhya kaṁda gāleya sthaḷadalā seṭṭi
gutta savviseṭṭi varasanu nāgaresana maga
boṁmarasa gaḷu samastepātrigaruṁ nereda bai
śaṇigeyalā seṭṭi yāciseṭṭiya maga kalliseṭṭi holauve
ya kētiseṭṭi svayaṁbhu dēvara gāvuṁḍa kētiseṭṭi yintivaru mukhyavāgaiyvatokkalu gaḷu
tāvu māḍisida śrī telligēsvaradēvargge svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ pra
tāpacakravartti siṁhaṇadēvavarśada 8 neya prabhava saṁvatsarada yāśāḍa bahuḷe Amā
vāsa yādivāra sūryyagrahaṇa byatīpāta nimittavāgi prabhugaḻu śrītelligēsvara dēvaraṁgabhōgaraṁ
gabhōgakhaṁḍasphuṭita jīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ paḍisalisuvantāgiyā sthānadācārya nāga rāsigu
rugaḷge dhārāpurvvakaṁ māḍi dēvara keyiṁ mūḍalu kaṟa�ṁṭha dēvara keyi
badaga 27 gēṇa ghaḷeyalu biṭṭa mattaru duṣṭara saṁkaseṭṭiya manayiṁ paḍuvalu
21 khaiya maneya nivēśaṇa 1 koṭṭaru Aynūrvva svāmigaḷu karaḍikalla 300 ṟa grā
mānugrāmada kāṇike varśakke haṇamaṁ biṭṭaru sāsirvvaru yeleya hēṟiṁge 100
Oḷḷeleyaṁ biṭṭaru Aivattokkalugaḷu tāvu māṟugoṁḍa Eḷḷige hoṁgevīsa (.) vumaṁ gāṇa
kke dinakke sūlige yaṇnevumaṁ santheya koḍakke Ōṁmānavaṁ biṭṭaru gāṇada meṭṭuvaru va
rśakke 1 haṇamaṁ koṭṭaru muṁmuridaṁḍa nakharaṁgaḷu seṭṭuga bhattavaṁ koṭṭaru Aivattokka
lugaḷu maduveyali 1 haṇa hettali 1 haṇava koṭṭaru . caitredalli 1 haṇa pavitrada
lu 1 haṇamaṁ koṭṭaru . priyadiṁdiṁtidaneyde kāva puruśaṁgāyuṁ mahāśrīyu
makkumidaṁ kāyada pāpige gurukṣētraṁgaḷalu vāraṇāsiyoḷe kōṭi munīṁ
draraṁ kavileyaṁ vēdāḍhyara koṁdudoṁdayaśaṁ sārggumideṁdu sāṟidapuvī śaiḷākṣa
rabrājigaḷu . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ śaṣṭirvarśasahaśrā
ṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . śrīsōmanāthadēva śaraṇu .
Digital edition of SII 15.156 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
